description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern, utilitarian design. The facade features a grid of evenly spaced windows, each outlined in red, creating a striking geometric pattern. The building is primarily light gray with red accents around the windows and at the base, giving it a clean and structured appearance. A central vertical section on one side houses a series of balconies or stairwells, adding depth and visual interest. The roof is flat and includes a small rooftop structure, likely for utilities or access. The overall look is functional and straightforward, typical of high-rise residential buildings in urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular apartment building with a grid of red-trimmed windows and a central vertical balcony or stairwell section, finished in light gray and red.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with a prominent central vertical section of balconies or stairwells and a grid of red-trimmed windows.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the building's depth and the plain, windowless side wall, with the rooftop structure visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a full grid of windows with red trim, lacking the central balcony feature seen on the front.
description_view_3: This angled side view shows the plain wall and the central vertical balcony or stairwell section extending along the building's height.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, symmetrical grid pattern, with each window evenly spaced both vertically and horizontally across the facade.
